title: Data, Strategy, & Ops
must_haves: Data / strategy / operations capability for an enterprise AI workflow platform
Comfort with the rigour expected by major financial institutions (Model ML's customers)
hard_blockers: Customer base is major financial institutions; role likely expects finance/data-analytical rigour and an IB/consulting/quant-adjacent profile that Ryan lacks
'Data' framing implies SQL/quantitative analysis depth not evidenced in Ryan's CV
Enterprise B2B / fintech domain rather than crypto/Web3 community-led growth
met_strengths: 6+ years met (~6.4 yrs); UK auth, London
Founder-adjacent strategy & ops ownership, fundraising support, cross-functional execution
one_line_verdict: Meets the 6+ year bar and London, but a 'Data, Strategy & Ops' role serving major financial institutions skews toward analytical/finance rigour and an IB/consulting profile — a stretch for an operator with no quant/data-engineering depth.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via YC Work at a Startup (job 95186, £90-130K, 6+ yrs, London, no visa). Full must-haves not exposed on the listing; degree not stated. Direct apply via workatastartup.com/jobs/95186.
